title: Review: feat: initial extraction from stoa-sieve-native
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — stoa-sieve reference and dependency doc are wrong but cosmetic; SieveRuntime dead scaffolding will generate confused user questions; KNOWN divergence already caused a bug once and will again.
Confidence: 30% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: no integration testing with real-world Sieve scripts or dovecot test corpus; address parsing is minimal (RFC 5322 addresses are complex); multi-action semantics not tested. Would raise confidence if: ran the Pigeonhole test suite against the evaluator; added tests for envelope test with address-part combinations; tested multiline string edge cases (dot-stuffing, CRLF terminator).
